title: Kilner Preserve Jar 0.5L (500ml) Round Glass Screw Top Lid Preservation Storage Jar for Jams Chutneys Small Pickled Fruits
features: WONDERFUL STORAGE SOLUTIONS | The Kilner 0.5 litre preserve jar is perfect for storing and preserving healthy, home grown foods, the jar capacity is the perfect size for pickling vegetables, preserving whole fruits and chunky chutneys
KEEP THINGS FRESH | Featuring a 2-piece lid system which comprises of a tin disc and screw band ensuring a secure vacuum seal is achieved, keeping the contents fresher for longer

NATURAL MATERIALS | Made from high-quality BPA-free soda-lime glass, this bottle does not absorb odours, flavours, or stains, not only is glass a healthier option, but it is also made to last and never for single use

REUSE, REFILL, RECYCLE | At Kilner we have been working hard to find practical solutions in our fight to reduce the production and use of plastic across the planet, we believe that the small changes we all adopt now will add up to make a huge difference to our future
THE KILNER STORY | Invented by john kilner and co, in england, the original kilner jar is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago
Kilner 0.5 litre Preserve Jar features a easy to use metal screw top
The lid is made up of 2 pieces, a replaceable vacuum seal and a metal screw band to secure the seal.
The screw band can be used up to 10 times.
The jars are perfect for storing dry foods stuff and also preserving fruits, jams and chutneys.
Dishwasher Safe, but Do not pour boiling water directly into your jars / bottles
